Who We Are

ABOUT HYDRA SPORTS

Hydra Sports & Tourism Pvt Ltd is Malappuram's premier sports academy, headquartered in Edakkara, Malappuram. We provide world-class professional coaching to young athletes across multiple disciplines.

Our academy proudly operates in 15+ schools across the region and has produced champions who hold national and world records. We believe every child has the potential to be a champion — we just help them discover it.

"To Inspire and train young talents to achieve excellence in sports through discipline, dedication, and teamwork."
Professional Coaching Technical Training Tournament Preparation Individual Attention Beginner to Advanced

🎯 Mission

To Inspire and train young talents to achieve excellence in sports through discipline, dedication, and teamwork.

🔭 Vision

To become a leading SPORTS COMPANY nurturing future champions with strong values and skills.

📍 Location

Edakkara, Malappuram, Kerala
Affiliated with CDSA (Calicut District Skating Association)

⛸️ MALAPPURAM'S FIRST ROLLER SKATING STADIUM

CHAMPIONS ARE
BORN ON WHEELS

Hydra Sports is proud to announce the upcoming launch of Malappuram's very first dedicated Roller Skating Stadium — a state-of-the-art facility in Edakkara built to nurture champions of tomorrow.

What We Train

OUR SPORTS

⛸️

Roller Skating

A thrilling sport that improves balance, speed, and coordination while making fitness fun on wheels.

🥋

Ryu Karate

A disciplined martial art that develops strength, focus, and self-confidence while teaching respect and self-defense.

🥊

Boxing

A powerful sport that builds endurance, confidence, and discipline while sharpening reflexes and mental strength.

🏀

Basketball

A team sport that builds teamwork, agility, and strategic thinking for players of all skill levels.

🏐

Volleyball

A dynamic team sport developing coordination, communication, and athletic ability on the court.

⚽

Football

The world's most popular sport, building teamwork, stamina, and speed in our young athletes.

🏓

Table Tennis

A fast-paced precision sport that enhances hand-eye coordination, reflexes, and mental sharpness.

🏍️

Moto Sport

A powerful sport that builds endurance, confidence, and discipline while sharpening reflexes.

🏊

Swimming

An all-round fitness sport that strengthens the body, improves stamina, and teaches life-saving water skills.

🎯

Kho-Kho

A traditional Indian team sport that builds speed, agility, and strategy — proudly part of our coaching lineup.

🎱

Drop Roball

An exciting and skill-based sport that challenges coordination, reaction time, and concentration.

Our Edge

WHY CHOOSE HYDRA?

🏆

World-Class Coaching

Professional coaching focused on technical aspects, tournament preparation, and winning strategies.

❤️

Care & Individual Attention

Each child receives dedicated love, coaching, technical knowledge, agility training, and strengthening exercises.

😊

Friendly Coaches

Approachable and encouraging coaches ensure every child enjoys fun-filled and focused training sessions.

🎯

Milestone-Driven Training

Our dedicated coaches track and celebrate every milestone your child achieves in their sporting journey.

🔥

Motivating Atmosphere

We create the best motivating and encouraging environment that pushes athletes to exceed their own limits.

📈

All Skill Levels

Classes offered at Beginner, Intermediate, and Advanced levels — we grow with every student.

🏅

Proven Results

5 Guinness World Records, 22 World Record Holders, and 15 National Record Holders speak for themselves.

🏫

School Partnerships

Present in 15+ schools across Malappuram, bringing professional sports coaching directly to students.
